title: India's robotics funding doubles in 2026 first-half, but scale seems far away
summary: India's robotics sector continues to lag its global peers. In 2025, Indian robotics startups raised less than 1% of the capital secured by US robotics startups and about 2% of that raised in China, according to Tracxn.

summary: As two powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela within minutes of each other, several Android users reported receiving Google earthquake alerts before the tremors reached them. The warnings were made possible by Google's Android Earthquake Alerts System.
